resources.name: Introduction to HTML
resources.description: At its heart, HTML is a fairly simple language made up of elements, which can be applied to pieces of text to give them different meaning in a document.

resources.name: What is accessibility?
resources.description: Accessibility is the practice of making your websites usable by as many people as possible.

resources.name: Learn to style HTML using CSS
resources.description: HTML is used to define the structure and semantics of your content, CSS is used to style it and lay it out.

resources.name: Basic Concepts of grid layout
resources.description: CSS Grid Layout introduces a two-dimensional grid system to CSS. Grids can be used to lay out major page areas or small user interface elements.

resources.name: Relationship of grid layout to other layout methods
resources.description: CSS Grid Layout has been designed to work alongside other parts of CSS, as part of a complete system for doing the layout.

resources.name: CSS Combinators
resources.description: Combinators are used to combine CSS selectors to create more complex selectors.

resources.name: CSS Diner (Game)
resources.description: A game to help you learn and practice CSS selectors.

resources.name: Flexbox Froggy (Game)
resources.description: A game for learning CSS flexbox.

resources.name: Grid Garden (Game)
resources.description: A game for learning CSS grid layout.

resources.name: A re-introduction to JavaScript
resources.description: Why a re-introduction? Because JavaScript is notorious for being misunderstood. It is often derided as being a toy, but beneath its layer of deceptive simplicity, powerful language features await.

resources.name: The Modern JavaScript Tutorial
resources.description: How it's done now. From the basics to advanced topics with simple, but detailed explanations.

resources.name: JavaScript Cheatsheet
resources.description: This basic cheat sheet, mostly based on the lessons on freeCodeCamp, tries to provide a basic reference for beginner and advanced developers and lower the entry barrier for newcomers.

resources.name: React Docs
resources.description: The official React documentation for modern React concepts, components, hooks, and patterns.

resources.name: Epic React
resources.description: A deeply practical React learning resource from Kent C. Dodds focused on real-world React skills.

resources.name: Beta React docs — Learn React
resources.description: A great place to learn the current React mental model straight from the official docs.

resources.name: TypeScript Documentation
resources.description: The official TypeScript docs covering language basics, advanced types, tooling, and tsconfig guidance.

resources.name: Total TypeScript
resources.description: A respected modern TypeScript learning resource with practical tutorials, exercises, and deep dives.

resources.name: TypeScript for JavaScript Programmers
resources.description: The official TypeScript guide for developers coming from JavaScript.

resources.name: OpenAI Prompt Engineering
resources.description: Practical prompting guides and best practices directly from OpenAI.

resources.name: Anthropic Learn
resources.description: Anthropic's learning hub covering Claude prompting, workflows, and practical usage patterns.

resources.name: Anthropic — Prompting Interactive Tutorial
resources.description: An interactive tutorial for learning strong prompt design patterns with Claude.

resources.name: Gemini Prompting Strategies
resources.description: Google's guidance for prompting Gemini effectively across different tasks.

resources.name: Hugging Face Learn
resources.description: A broad set of AI and ML learning resources spanning models, tasks, and practical workflows.

resources.name: OpenAI Developer Docs
resources.description: Official OpenAI API docs for building applications with models, tools, and structured outputs.

resources.name: Vercel AI SDK
resources.description: A practical SDK for building AI features into modern web apps with strong framework support.

resources.name: Model Context Protocol
resources.description: The MCP spec and docs for connecting models to tools, files, and external systems.

resources.name: LangChain Docs
resources.description: Documentation for building LLM-powered applications, workflows, and agents.

resources.name: LlamaIndex Docs
resources.description: A framework for connecting LLMs with external data and building retrieval-based applications.
